---
title: "Fanny Backhurst"
---

## Fanny Backhurst

**Dates:** (fl.15 March 1852)

### Description

a pupil of CMY at Otterbourne school

### Biography

She married a soldier and just died three weeks after the birth of her baby.  She was probably daughter of James Backhurst (b. 1800/1), carpenter, of Otterbourne.

### Letters

- Letter from March 15th [1852[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
